transcript.clean_text: the world tour finally underway at the uae well a desert landscape to play with constant temperatures and virtually no wind unlike last year and today was surely going to be one for the sprinters out from marinette zayed into the desert a turnaround and then straight back so a headwind at the beginning of the day and a tailwind to bring everybody home well remarkably after 184 kilometers the peloton would have climbed over 1300 meters of altitude gain where they found those lumps and bumps is anybody's guess it was very flat two intermediate sprints along the way so offering up some bonuses and prize money for those who are brave enough to take on the break two from grass bomb decided to do exactly that kochetkov and dmitry strachoff who took both of the intermediate sprint springs up busteli and tony with the password for body island who got in the break and vavlossum of lord of saddam has sent a short-handed team to this race of just four riders well did strikeoff fancy pushing all the way to the line after he'd done the duty of taking both of the intermediate sprints and guaranteeing himself with the bonus seconds a decent finish at the end of the day provided he ended in the pack well a puncture of convenience offered itself up and he was absorbed leaving only four up front and there was no real motivation to catch those up the road a road that was arrows straight from 60 kilometers all the way to the finish line the longest finished straight then perhaps in cycling well the pace was not high as finally the breakaway was wound in and then it was about colour order indeed the colour of the cheeks were slightly flushed for those whose mind faded and the wheels touched within the pack no serious injuries but there were a few bumps and bruises and perhaps a little embarrassment rick zabal finding himself on the deck no harm done well after the touch of wheels it kind of woke everybody up or refocused them the breakaway offered its smiles to itself they'd done a job today but the sacrificial lambs were wound in with just over 19 kilometers to go and then it was about colour order and who indeed would have the train to deliver well with the road mobbed and a few little arguments and pushes and bumps and bruises out there to try and find space some opted to stay out of trouble sam bennett one of the out and out favorites was at the back with his team the base was picked up by uae wanted a good show for pascal ackermann out there in his home race but with mark cavendish dylan grover bagan spartsman barbier viviani damar this was a roster of fantastic sprinting talent and when we hit the flam rouge who was in position and who was not that was the big question grown of against team looked to light it up they set the pace team at bike exchange but others had great interest not least albertson fenix he asked for philipson when he went for it gronovegan tucked in on his back wheel and we were searching for viviani and indeed for sam bennett and where was mark cavendish harried and harangued were all of the sprinters and when you have so much greatness all together often the result is something of a surprise girl of again taking to the barriers but yes with phillips and doing enough to hold on brother vegan not happy and a few others of the splinters likewise they of course will have a second chance tomorrow sam bennett out of position finished extraordinarily strongly thankfully putting his knee injuries to the back of our thoughts bennett just missing out on the win viviani in third place gruner vegan emma's leipens also there anna de mar counter coy de vries ackermann mark cavanish just fading the bright knight was on jasper phillips happy man job well done for alperson phoenix and in this company those are huge scalps that he took as a result he gets the overall standings and the coveted reds jersey nearest to him with uh struck off having assembled some bonus seconds out on the road finds himself running in third place a great race more sprinting absolutely guaranteed on stage two you
